data.name: Cosplay Collection
data.detailed_description:
這是一款畫廊模擬器, 裡面有豐富的服裝與各式性愛場景供觀賞, 操作上直覺簡單, 沒有漫長的遊戲解謎過程, 遊戲即開即觀賞, 適合想要快速看到結局的玩家遊玩, 滿足玩家豐富的想像力!



♻此為sword x hime衍生作品, 可視為畫廊的獨立版本♻
畫廊裡的H動作是一樣的, 有購買過劍姬遊戲的朋友們再請斟酌
該作與劍姬版的不同在於多角色追加, 全新的光影系統
肉體動態, 布料和頭髮動態, 絲襪質感, 在新引擎下得到了強化
構造精簡, 更小的容量以及更快的執行速度
精簡過後的服裝與怪物, 將模型穿插的問題降至最低


♻在購買後若發現無法順利遊玩時請立即申請退款♻
我的專長是美術, 程式剛學, 無法解決艱深的系統衝突問題, 請見諒 (◞‸◟)
一般情況下只要顯卡符合DirectX 12, Windows10系統, 12GB Ram都能順利運行

♻遊戲資料夾裡還有一個HDRP版本, 畫質光影更好但更吃效能, 有部分配備可能無法運行, 請斟酌使用♻


系統需求
Windows10 64bit
CPU: Intel Core i5-10400以上
RAM: 12GB以上
儲存空間: 5GB以上
解析度: 1920x1080以上、支援21:9
顯卡: nVIDIA GTX 1660ti以上

顯卡(GPU)效能參考:
nVIDIA GTX 1060ti: 1920x1080 45FPS
nVIDIA GTX 1660ti: 1920x1080 60FPS
nVIDIA RTX 3660ti: 1920x1080 90FPS
nVIDIA RTX 4070ti: 1920x1080 180FPS
Steam deck: 1280x720 45FPS

起動時間參考:
機械HDD 25秒
SATA SSD 15秒
PCIe Gen4 M.2 SSD 6秒

data.short_description: 這是一款擁有豐富的性愛場景的畫廊模擬器
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows10
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050ti
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows10
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060ti
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 13
  • 處理器: M2, M3
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 13
  • 處理器: M2, M3
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS Holo 64 bit/Arch Linux 64 bit/Ubuntu 22.04.3 64 bit
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050ti
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS Holo 64 bit/Arch Linux 64 bit/Ubuntu 22.04.3 64 bit
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060ti
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Cosplay Collection
data.detailed_description:
This is a gallery simulator with a wealth of costumes and various sex scenes for viewing. The operation is intuitive and simple, there is no long game puzzle solving process, the game can be watched immediately, and it is suitable for players who want to see the ending quickly, satisfy the everyone's rich imagination!



♻This is a derivative work of sword x hime, it can be regarded as an independent version of the gallery♻
The H action in the gallery is the same, friends who have purchased the sword x hime game, please consider
The difference between this work and the sword x hime version is the addition of multiple characters and a new lighting system
Body dynamics, cloth and hair dynamics, pantyhose quality, have been enhanced under the new engine
Compact structure, smaller capacity and faster execution
Streamlined costumes and monsters to minimize the problem of model interspersed


♻If you find that you cannot play smoothly after purchase, please apply for a refund immediately♻
My major is art, I just learned programming few months, I can't solve difficult system conflicts, please forgive me (◞‸◟)
Under normal circumstances, as long as the graphics card conforms to DirectX 12, Windows10 system, 16GB Ram can run smoothly

♻There is also an HDRP version in the game folder, which has better image quality and lighting but requires more performance. Some equipment may not run, so please consider using it♻


System requirement
Windows10 64bit
CPU: Intel Core i5-10400 or above
RAM: 12GB or more
Storage space: 5GB or more
Resolution: 1920x1080 or above, supports 21:9
Graphics card: nVIDIA GTX 1660ti or above

Graphics card (GPU) performance reference:
nVIDIA GTX 1060ti: 1920x1080 45FPS
nVIDIA GTX 1660ti: 1920x1080 60FPS
nVIDIA RTX 3660ti: 1920x1080 90FPS
nVIDIA RTX 4070ti: 1920x1080 180FPS
Steam deck: 1280x720 45FPS

Starting time reference:
Mechanical HDD 25 seconds
SATA SSD 15 seconds
PCIe Gen4 M.2 SSD 6seconds
